doc: Canonical question shapes for high-confidence routing. When a message (parent or sub-question) matches a shape, the topic-router upgrades the keyword-fallback result from `mode=fallback` to `mode=canonical_shape`, which prevents `fix_v5_phase6b:subquery_inherited_parent` from overriding it. The planner reads `evidence_shape_override` to pick a tabular_reference budget with a high snippet_char_limit so calendar/table data survives chunk truncation.
match_rule: All trigger groups (question_words_any, subject_phrases_any, qualifier_phrases_any) must each have at least one phrase present in the normalized (lowercased + accents-stripped) message AND `topic` must equal the classifier's effective_topic. Any shape with empty trigger group counts that group as satisfied.
growth_pattern: To add a new pattern: copy a shape, change `id`, list synonyms in `subject_phrases_any` and `qualifier_phrases_any`, set `topic` to the keyword-classifier topic the shape applies to. To extend an existing pattern, append synonyms to its phrase arrays.

shapes.description: Plazos / fechas de presentación de declaración de renta de personas jurídicas — calendario tributario por último dígito del NIT.
